requestment_date.text: วันที่คำขอกู้

loan_requestment_no.text: เลขที่คำขอกู้

root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as memname ,pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as age_life_text ,pka_com_function.fp_form_idcard(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card) as id_card ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.marriage_status
--ที่อยู่ ,sc_mem_m_member_address.address_no ,sc_mem_m_member_address.moo ,sc_mem_m_member_address.soi ,sc_mem_m_member_address.road ,pka_com_function.fp_get_sub_district_name(sc_mem_m_member_address.tambol) as tambol ,pka_com_function.fp_get_district_name(sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code,sc_mem_m_member_address.district_code) as district_name ,pka_com_function.fp_get_province_name(sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code) as province_name ,sc_mem_m_member_address.postcode ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_tel(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, '0') as telephone
,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_position_long(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as position_long ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_request_amount ,pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai( sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_request_amount ) as loan_request_amount_thai ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.period_payment_amount ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_installment_amount ,pka_lon_intsrv.fp_intrate_table_loantype( sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type , sc_lon_m_loan_request.begining_of_contract ) * 100 as lon_int_rate ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.last_payment_amount ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_loan_request.start_keep_date ,'MONTH YYYY') as start_keep_date --วันที่เริ่มงวด ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no
,(select sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.type_pay_money from sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid where sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) as type_pay_money
,(select pka_com_function.fp_form(sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.bank_acc_no,'XXX-X-XXXXX-X')as bank_acc_no from sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid where sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) as bank_acc_no_trb
,(select pka_com_function.fp_form(sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.bank_acc_no,'XX-XXXXX-X')as bank_acc_no from sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid where sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) as bank_acc_no_trd
,(select sc_acc_m_ucf_bank.bank_name from sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid ,sc_acc_m_ucf_bank where sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.bank_code = sc_acc_m_ucf_bank.bank_id and sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ) as bank_name
,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date ,'SD MONTH YYYY') as requestment_tdate ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_loan_request.begining_of_contract ,'SD MONTH YYYY') as begining_of_contract_tdate ,sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name
,(select deposit_account_no from sc_lon_m_req_fee where sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type = '20') as deposit_account_no
--ประกัน ,(select sc_lon_m_req_fee.remark from sc_lon_m_req_fee where sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and fee_type = '17')as insure_remark --หมายเหตุ ,sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.other_loan_remark -- กรณี type_pay_money เป็น CHQ, 101 ให้เอาข้อมูลช่องนี้เเสดง ,to_snumber(sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.paid_amount) as paid_amount --เงินรับจริง
--หลักประกันอสังหาริมทรัพย์ ,(SELECT sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_own_no FROM sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code = '04' ) as coll_estate_no
,(SELECT sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_description FROM sc_lon_m_req_coll where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code = '04' ) as coll_estate_desc
--เงินฝาก ,(select sc_lon_m_req_fee.deposit_account_no from sc_lon_m_req_fee where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type = '20') as deposit_account_no --เลขบัญชี(บัญชีเงินฝาก) ,(select sum(sc_lon_m_req_fee.amount) from sc_lon_m_req_fee where sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type = '20') as amount --จำนวนเงิน(บัญชีเงินฝาก)
from sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group ,sc_mem_m_member_address ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type ,sc_lon_m_loan_request ,sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid ,sc_cnt_m_coop
where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type and sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_loan_request_mpaid.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type ='1'
/*WHERE*/
--and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = '67ปค00029'
--รายงานนี้ มี formating rule ใน nest นะคับ
